chapter_title.en: The Fifty-Forth Assembly, the Assembly of Tuesday, the First of Rabi` al-Akhir, 368 AH.

text: 3 - وبهذا الاسناد، قال: قال رسول الله (صلى الله عليه وآله): من فارق جماعة المسلمين فقد خلع ربقة الاسلام من عنقه، قيل: يا رسول الله، وما جماعة المسلمين؟ قال: جماعة أهل الحق وإن قلوا (2).

en.bilal-muhammad: By this isnad, he said: The Messenger of Allah (s) said: Whoever splits away from the Muslim community has taken the collar of Islam off his neck. It was said: O Messenger of Allah! What is the Muslim community? He said: The community of the people of truth, even if they are few.
